name: Carousel
flavor: Round and round, riders young and old reach for brass rings and stolen glances at the horizon. The carousel has a way of making everyone feel five again.

name: Ferris Wheel
flavor: From the top you can see the whole park — and the whole park can see you. Couples linger at the peak; kids press their faces against the gondola glass.

name: Tea Cups
flavor: Spin it harder, they say, and then immediately regret it. The Tea Cups turn what should be a gentle ride into a dizzying contest of nerve and stomach fortitude.

name: Tower Swings
flavor: At full height the ground is a distant rumor and the wind doesn't care about your white knuckles. Riders scream on the way up and laugh on the way down.

name: Tilt-A-Whirl
flavor: Unpredictable, chaotic, and entirely at the mercy of physics. The Tilt-A-Whirl has no mercy. Riders negotiate with centrifugal force and usually lose.

name: Bumper Cars
flavor: All the rules of the road suspended for three glorious minutes. Collisions are encouraged, traffic laws are decorative, and everyone is simultaneously predator and prey.

name: Drop Tower
flavor: There's a long, slow climb where riders have plenty of time to reconsider every decision that led to this moment. Then the floor disappears.

name: Haunted House
flavor: The scares are theatrical but the shrieking is entirely genuine. Guests enter in confident groups and emerge individually, blinking, noticeably closer together than before.

name: Log Flume
flavor: A leisurely river cruise followed by a plunge riders absolutely knew was coming and somehow still weren't ready for. The splash is non-negotiable. The second queue is always shorter.

name: Boomerang Coaster
flavor: Six inversions, two directions, one continuous scream. The Boomerang runs its circuit forward, then — before riders have a moment to recover — runs it straight back.

name: Mega Coaster
flavor: Visible from the highway and audible from the car park, the Mega Coaster doesn't just attract visitors — it becomes the reason they came. The park's skyline will never look the same.
